ast.name: ReleaseCommitment

functions.name: __covenant_policy_acknowledgeFinance

exprs.span:
{
            commitmentId: prev_state.commitmentId,
            evidenceDigest: prev_state.evidenceDigest,
            sourceCommitmentId: prev_state.sourceCommitmentId,
            status: 1,
            financeAcknowledged: true,
            billingAcknowledged: false,
            financeOwner: prev_state.financeOwner,
            billingPolicyLead: prev_state.billingPolicyLead,
            relicAttestor: prev_state.relicAttestor
        }

data.span:
return {
            commitmentId: prev_state.commitmentId,
            evidenceDigest: prev_state.evidenceDigest,
            sourceCommitmentId: prev_state.sourceCommitmentId,
            status: 1,
            financeAcknowledged: true,
            billingAcknowledged: false,
            financeOwner: prev_state.financeOwner,
            billingPolicyLead: prev_state.billingPolicyLead,
            relicAttestor: prev_state.relicAttestor
        };

functions.name: __covenant_entrypoint_auth_acknowledgeBilling
__covenant_policy_supersede

exprs.span:
{
            commitmentId: prev_state.commitmentId,
            evidenceDigest: prev_state.evidenceDigest,
            sourceCommitmentId: supersedingCommitmentId,
            status: 3,
            financeAcknowledged: true,
            billingAcknowledged: true,
            financeOwner: prev_state.financeOwner,
            billingPolicyLead: prev_state.billingPolicyLead,
            relicAttestor: prev_state.relicAttestor
        }

data.span:
return {
            commitmentId: prev_state.commitmentId,
            evidenceDigest: prev_state.evidenceDigest,
            sourceCommitmentId: supersedingCommitmentId,
            status: 3,
            financeAcknowledged: true,
            billingAcknowledged: true,
            financeOwner: prev_state.financeOwner,
            billingPolicyLead: prev_state.billingPolicyLead,
            relicAttestor: prev_state.relicAttestor
        };
